content:
## Page Section / Title  
(No explicit section title shown on the page)  


## All Verbatim Text  
- **Sightbox** (brand name, top-left)  
- **THANK YOU.** (large, centered headline)  
- **Charlie Hinojosa** (bottom-left, name)  
- **Chief Executive Officer** (bottom-left, title)  
- **charlie@sightbox.co** (bottom-left, email)  
- **Nathan Thompson** (bottom-center, name)  
- **Chief Creative Officer** (bottom-center, title)  
- **nathan@sightbox.co** (bottom-center, email)  
- Social media icons (bottom-right: LinkedIn, Instagram, X, YouTube, Facebook, TikTok)  


## Visual Elements  
### Logos  
- **Sightbox Logo**: Located top-left. Consists of a geometric icon (two stacked, overlapping white shapes resembling a stylized "S" or chevron) paired with the word "Sightbox" in bold, sans-serif white text. Clear space around the logo is implied (not explicitly measured, but visually distinct from surrounding elements).  

### Color Palette  
- **Primary Background**: Black (#000000)  
- **Text/Logo Color**: White (#FFFFFF)  
- **Accent Grid Lines**: Subtle purple/blue gradient lines (no explicit HEX/RGB provided, but visible as thin, translucent lines forming a 3D grid pattern).  

### Typography  
- **Headline**: Large, bold, sans-serif typeface (e.g., "THANK YOU." in a heavy weight, likely a geometric sans-serif like Helvetica or similar).  
- **Body Text**: Smaller, regular-weight sans-serif (e.g., names, titles, emails in a lighter weight, consistent with the headline font family).  

### Imagery / Photography  
- **Background**: Abstract 3D grid pattern with thin, translucent purple/blue lines on a black background. No photographic imagery; purely geometric and digital.  

### Iconography  
- **Social Media Icons**: Minimalist, white, square icons with rounded corners (or square) featuring standard social media logos (LinkedIn, Instagram, X, YouTube, Facebook, TikTok). Consistent style (flat, monochromatic, modern).  

### Layout Grid  
- **Column Structure**: Implied two-column layout at the bottom (left: contact info; center: contact info; right: social icons).  
- **Margins/Spacing**: Generous white space around the "THANK YOU." headline (centered, occupying most of the upper half). Bottom section has balanced spacing between contact blocks and social icons.  

### Geometric / Decorative Elements  
- **3D Grid Pattern**: Background consists of interconnected, translucent purple/blue lines forming a perspective grid (suggesting depth and a digital/tech aesthetic).  


## Page Layout Summary  
- **Top Section**: Sightbox logo (top-left) and large "THANK YOU." headline (centered, dominant visual).  
- **Bottom Section**: Two columns of contact info (left: Charlie Hinojosa; center: Nathan Thompson) and a row of social media icons (right).  
- **Overall Flow**: Vertical hierarchy (logo → headline → contact/social), with the headline as the focal point. Black background with white text creates high contrast.  


## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page  
- **Logo Usage**: Implied "do" rule (logo is prominently displayed at top-left, suggesting primary placement for brand recognition).  
- **Typography Hierarchy**: Clear distinction between headline (large, bold) and body text (smaller, regular), indicating a structured typographic system.  
- **Color Contrast**: High contrast between black background and white text (ensures readability).  
- **Social Media Integration**: Standard social media icons included, suggesting a "do" rule for linking to platforms.  
- **Contact Info Clarity**: Names, titles, and emails are clearly labeled and spaced, indicating a "do" rule for transparent communication.
